extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked midway through the final Cat-1 climb, dropped VINGEGAARD solo to win by ~24 seconds and seize back time after yesterday's losses.
tactical_patterns: UAE reversed roles from Stage 5, attacking instead of defending after Pogačar's previous day losses showed vulnerability.
Jumbo-Visma sent VAN AERT into early break to create havoc, repeating 2022 Tour disruption tactic.
Pogačar's attack came halfway up final Cat-1 climb, exploiting steepening gradients rather than waiting for summit.
10-second time bonus motivated Pogačar to ride through line at full gas, reversing typical stage winner celebration behavior.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: responded immediately to Stage 5 defeat with solo victory, suggesting psychological resilience absent in 2022 Tour
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: took yellow but lost 24+ seconds on Cat-1 finish, unexpected weakness on gradient steeper than yesterday'sCol de Marie Blanque
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: deployed as breakaway disruptor on short 145km stage, forcing rivals to chase rather than control
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: brief yellow jersey stint ended but held podium position, confirming GC viability beyond Giro form
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: animated in early VAN AERT chase, showing willingness to engage on Pyrenean stages despite non-GC status
